subcodes.first_line: God shall verily console thee in all that hath befallen thee, and bring to thy remembrance that which dispelleth sorrow, for naught escapeth His knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد یعزیک الله فیما ورد علیک و یذکرک بما تذهب به الاحزان انه لایعزب عن علمه
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
